mnemonics: HALT: Household, Aerospace, Large IT, Telecommunications - the major sources of e-waste.
keyPoints: The main types of e-waste include ICT equipment, consumer electronics, large household appliances, and medical devices.
Primary sources of e-waste are households, businesses, government agencies, and manufacturers/retailers.
E-waste is one of the fastest-growing waste streams globally due to rapid technological advancement and short product lifecycles.
commonMistakes: Assuming only computers and phones are e-waste, ignoring items like medical equipment or industrial controls.
Believing businesses are not a significant source of e-waste compared to households.
Overlooking that new, unused electronics from manufacturing or retail can also become e-waste.
